initialTests.label: A1c, fasting plasma glucose, or 2-hour 75-g OGTT.

source.source_section: Prediabetes generated endocrine workup: diagnostic workup
source.implementation_notes: Generated from guideline-backed endocrine workup automation; schema, source, PHI, and regression tests run on 2026-06-06.

initialTests.action: Interpret with local lab ranges. Reference anchors: A1c: normal <5.7%; prediabetes 5.7-6.4%; diabetes >=6.5%. Fasting plasma glucose: normal <100 mg/dL; prediabetes 100-125; diabetes >=126. 2-hour 75-g OGTT: normal <140 mg/dL; prediabetes 140-199; diabetes >=200. Random plasma glucose >=200 mg/dL with classic symptoms supports diabetes diagnosis. Use local laboratory intervals and assay-specific cutoffs; endocrine immunoassays are affected by pregnancy, age, sex, acute illness, binding proteins, biotin, and medication effects.

initialTests.label: Lipids, ALT if fatty liver risk, BP/BMI/waist.

Use local laboratory intervals and assay-specific cutoffs; endocrine immunoassays are affected by pregnancy, age, sex, acute illness, binding proteins, biotin, and medication effects.

initialTests.label: Compare with prior results and repeat discordant nonurgent endocrine tests using correct timing, local assay, and interference precautions.
